projects.title: OpenAI App (Flutter & Android)
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile application integrating OpenAI APIs for intelligent assistance.
projects.fullDetails: Developed a cross-platform mobile application powered by Flutter and natively compiled for Android/iOS. It integrates seamlessly with OpenAI's API to deliver intelligent prompt processing, code generation, and ambient conversational capabilities directly natively.
features: Real-time AI prompt processing via OpenAI GPT

projects.title: To-Do Task App
projects.description: Task management productivity application with offline-first architecture.
projects.fullDetails: Constructed a responsive task tracker utilizing robust state management and local storage to prevent data loss. The UI relies heavily on physical spring physics for drag-to-delete behaviors reflecting premium app interactions.

projects.title: Rock Paper Scissors Game
projects.description: Interactive mobile game with state management logic and AI opponent.
projects.fullDetails: A lightweight mobile experience demonstrating fundamental state machines and stateless vs. stateful UI component separation. Includes haptic feedback hooks and randomized delay algorithms to simulate an opponent AI.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: Classic logic game with dynamic UI mapping and winner evaluation.
projects.fullDetails: Implemented the classic 3x3 grid game relying on two-dimensional array mappings and continuous winner-evaluation loops mapped directly to reactive UI states.

projects.title: Flappy Bird Game
projects.description: Physics-based clone with raw velocity loops and real-time collision detection.
projects.fullDetails: A complete mobile clone integrating raw rendering loop velocities and collision-detection algorithms to emulate gravity, impulse tracking, and bounded box collisions in real-time.

projects.title: Mindful Meal Timer
projects.description: Health-oriented utility app managing timed eating intervals.
projects.fullDetails: An application designed to pace eating habits using background service timers, local notifications, and highly accessible contrasting UI rings tracking elapsed time.

projects.title: Gemini AI Chat App
projects.description: Real-time dialogue interface backed by Google's Gemini LLMs.
projects.fullDetails: A robust chat implementation utilizing advanced asynchronous stream handling. Built directly against the Gemini API to rapidly parse rich text, render code blocks, and maintain massive context windows securely on mobile.

projects.title: Cloud View Service
projects.description: Distributed monitoring and data telemetry dashboard UI.
projects.fullDetails: Engineered to map incoming data sets from remote sensory systems into readable, responsive frontend blocks mimicking core enterprise dashboard structures.

projects.title: iOS Projects
projects.description: Various internal and test applications built with Swift for iOS.
projects.fullDetails: A collection of Swift-based iOS applications exploring different UIKit and SwiftUI patterns, gesture recognizers, CoreData integration, and native API usage.

projects.title: Dicee App
projects.description: Randomized number generation using device accelerometer shake gestures.
projects.fullDetails: Introduced native gesture shaking detection utilizing accelerometer APIs to trigger constrained random number generations dynamically refreshing the UI.

projects.title: Xylophone App
projects.description: Low-latency audio application playing sequenced audio nodes on touch.
projects.fullDetails: An interactive soundboard proving low-latency audio caching and playback abilities inside a compact, vibrant, touch-responsive grid.

projects.title: Egg Timer
projects.description: Precise multi-stage background-executing chronometer with notifications.
projects.fullDetails: Leveraged deeply nested background thread processes to prevent the OS from killing the timer when the app leaves the foreground.
